entity.summary: Thailand-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Bitkub brand.

events.title: Bitkub was founded in Thailand
events.description: Bitkub was founded in February 2018 as a Thailand-based digital-asset and cryptocurrency exchange platform.
events.notes: Month-level founding marker based on official company materials.

evidence.title: About Bitkub
evidence.notes: Official company page states that Bitkub was founded in February 2018.

evidence.title: Bitkub and Rapidz allow merchants to cash in or out with THB or crypto
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous official company article describes Bitkub as founded in February 2018.
